from delta.tables import DeltaTable
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

control_path = "abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/pipeline_watermark"

if not DeltaTable.isDeltaTable(spark, control_path):
    spark.createDataFrame(
        [("Fact_Patient_Visit", "1900-01-01")],
        ["table_name", "last_processed_ts"]
    ).write.format("delta").save(control_path)

patients_df = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/Patients/")
admissions_df = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/Admissions/")
diagnosis_map_df = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/Diagnoses_icd/")
diagnosis_ref_df = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/D_icd_diagnoses/")
insurance_df = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/Insurance/")
doctors_df = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/Doctors/")
departments_df = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/Departments/")

from pyspark.sql.functions import rand

fact_base = fact_base \
    .withColumn("total_amount", (rand()*10000).cast("double")) \
    .withColumn("insurance_amount", col("total_amount")*0.7) \
    .withColumn("self_pay_amount", col("total_amount")*0.3) \
    .withColumn("medicine_cost", (rand()*2000).cast("double"))

from pyspark.sql.functions import *

dim_date = admissions_df \
    .select(to_date("admittime").alias("full_date")) \
    .distinct() \
    .withColumn("day", dayofmonth("full_date")) \
    .withColumn("month", month("full_date")) \
    .withColumn("quarter", quarter("full_date")) \
    .withColumn("year", year("full_date"))

from pyspark.sql.window import Window
from pyspark.sql.functions import row_number

window_spec = Window.orderBy("full_date")

dim_date = dim_date.withColumn("date_sk", row_number().over(window_spec))

dim_date.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").save("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/Dim_Date/")

from pyspark.sql.functions import current_date, lit

dim_patient = patients_df \
    .withColumn("effective_from", current_date()) \
    .withColumn("effective_to", lit("9999-12-31").cast("date")) \
    .withColumn("is_current", lit("Y"))

window_spec = Window.orderBy("patient_id")

dim_patient = dim_patient \
    .withColumn("patient_sk", row_number().over(window_spec))

dim_patient.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").save("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/Dim_Patient/")

from pyspark.sql.functions import monotonically_increasing_id

dim_department = departments_df \
    .select("department_id", "department_name", "department_head") \
    .distinct() \
    .withColumn("department_sk", monotonically_increasing_id())

dim_department.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").save("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/Dim_Department/")

from pyspark.sql.window import Window
from pyspark.sql.functions import row_number

dim_diagnosis = diagnosis_map_df \
    .join(diagnosis_ref_df, "icd_code", "left") \
    .select(
        col("icd_code").alias("diagnosis_code"),
        col("long_title").alias("diagnosis_description")
    ) \
    .distinct()

window_spec = Window.orderBy("diagnosis_code")

dim_diagnosis = dim_diagnosis.withColumn("diagnosis_sk", row_number().over(window_spec))

dim_diagnosis.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").save("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/Dim_Diagnosis/")
#### Replace Business Keys with Surrogate Keys

dim_patient = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/Dim_Patient/")
dim_doctor = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/gold//Dim_Doctor/")
dim_diagnosis = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/Dim_Diagnosis/")
dim_date = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/Dim_Date/")
dim_department = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/Dim_Department")

fact_final = fact_base \
    .join(dim_patient.filter(col("is_current")=="Y"), "patient_id") \
    .join(dim_doctor, "doctor_id", "left") \
    .join(dim_diagnosis,
          fact_base.icd_code == dim_diagnosis.diagnosis_code,
          "left") \
    .join(dim_date, 
          to_date(fact_base.admittime)==dim_date.full_date, 
          "left") \
    .select(
        "visit_id",
        "patient_sk",
        "doctor_sk",
        "diagnosis_sk",
        "date_sk",
        "total_amount",
        "insurance_amount",
        "self_pay_amount",
        "medicine_cost"
    ) \
    .withColumn("visit_count", lit(1))

new_ts = admissions_incremental \
    .agg(max("admittime")) \
    .collect()[0][0]

spark.sql(f"""
UPDATE delta.`{control_path}`
SET last_processed_ts = '{new_ts}'
WHERE table_name = 'Fact_Patient_Visit'
